name: node-agent-base
title: node-agent-base
description:
Node.js wrapper around http.Agent class
node-agent-base provides an abstract class that must define a connect()
function which is responsible for creating the underlying socket that the
HTTP client requests will use.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-agent-base because Node.js wrapper around http.Agent class.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-agent-base as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-agent-base with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-agent-base --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
